heading: Orders to effectuate revision of boundaries; publication
label: 441g Orders to effectuate revision of boundaries; publication
text: The revision of boundaries of the national park, as authorized in , shall be accomplished by the issuance, by the Secretary of the Interior, of an appropriate order, or orders, such order or orders to be effective upon publication in the Federal Register: , That federally owned land under the administrative jurisdiction of any other department or agency of the Federal Government shall be included within the park only with the approval of the head of such department or agency.section 441f of this titleProvided
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “sections 1 and 5 of this Act”. Section 1 of the Act is classified to . Section 5 is probably a reference to section 5 of the original bill, which would have authorized the inclusion of up to 4,000 acres of the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation within the Badlands National Monument. Such section 5 was stricken from the bill by Senate amendment, and as enacted the Act contained only four sections.Section 441f of this titlesection 441f of this title

Change of NameWord “park” substituted in text for “monument” pursuant to , which is classified to and which redesignated Badlands National Monument as Badlands National Park.Pub. L. 95–625, § 611section 441e–1 of this title
